description_long: This is a pump-action shotgun with a striking red finish on the stock, receiver, and fore-end, contrasted by black metal barrels and action components. The shotgun features a full-length tubular magazine running parallel beneath the main barrel, both of which are black and extend to the front of the firearm. The stock is a traditional full stock with a black buttpad and a subtle checkered grip area for improved handling. A visible pump mechanism is present on the fore-end, textured for grip, and a single red shotgun shell is displayed alongside the firearm. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing the trigger securely. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where durability and reliability are essential.
description: A red pump-action shotgun with a full stock, black dual barrels, and a visible pump mechanism, accompanied by a single red shell. The design is robust and visually striking, blending red and black elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, red stock, black barrels, and the pump mechanism, with a red shell placed below.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the twin black barrels and the width of the pump fore-end, with minimal stock visibility.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the red stock, black barrels, and pump, with the red shell below.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the alignment of the barrels, the black buttpad, and the red coloration along the stock and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single main barrel with a parallel tubular magazine below; both are long and black with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
